name: HPC Holdings Limited
summary: HPC Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of general building and civil engineering construction works in Singapore. The company provides contractor and subcontractor construction services for the public and private sectors. It designs and builds projects for commercial and industrial buildings, such as logistics and warehouses facilities comprising train stations, tunnels, railways, and express ways; factories; offices; workshops; car parks; and nursing homes. The company's subcontracting works relate to the upgrading of HDB flats, as well as construction of MRT stations, schools, factories, and highways. It also offers engineering design and consultancy services. HPC Holdings Limited was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Singapore.
